testimonials.name: Ayesha Khan
testimonials.comment: Amazing bridal makeup service! The artist was so professional and made me look absolutely stunning on my wedding day.

testimonials.name: Fatima Ali
testimonials.comment: The mehndi design was absolutely beautiful! Intricate patterns and the color came out perfectly. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Sana Ahmed
testimonials.comment: Excellent facial service! My skin feels so fresh and glowing. The therapist was very gentle and professional.

testimonials.name: Zara Malik
testimonials.comment: Perfect hair treatment! My hair feels so soft and manageable after the keratin treatment. Worth every penny!

testimonials.name: Hira Shahid
testimonials.comment: Great waxing service! Very hygienic and professional. The fruit wax was gentle on my sensitive skin.
